sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3923" key="a)le/asqai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλέασθαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλέασθε</orth>, <sense id="n3923.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀλέομαι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλέατα</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀλείατα</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
